creator: rafi@guengel.ch
text:
As of r351201, print/cups-base seems to be missing a rc script for starting cups-browsed.

Fix: Attached a patch that provides files/cups_browsed.in and alters USE_RC_SUBR in Makefile to include the rc script.

How-To-Repeat: Install print/cups-base. There is only /usr/local/etc/rc.d/cupsd which apparently only starts cupsd.
